TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Nu-wiy a bayu'śĆ™Ś®ĀśĶ∑ nilaculan nu-wiy a bayu' tini i amis a satipyu nu cacayay a lu-yun a bayu', tini i nu-wiy tipan tu amisan masasu panan , u amisay a bayu' at uke-lin-lan a bayu' nu teban . nu-wiy a bayu'nu tipan atu pin-taw a bayu' matatulin , nuwalian nuamisan atu pa-lun nu ciid a lalaikidan nu nanum matatepal , i nu tipan atu timulan , pi-taw at ulu-cin a subal kalalaad nu sasanu bayu' matatihepa u satipyu nu hekal atu nu-wiy a bayu' u malaliyasay . nu-wiy a bayu' atu ke-lin-lan a bayu' , u hekal nu bayu tasasaen 2katukuh3 nu sasa nu bayu' , u sasaay nu bayu a nanum u cuedetay idaw ku walak talakaw. kyu nu-wiynu tipan a bayu' idaw ku dihkuay a likid nu sasaay a nanum nu bayu' . walian a sulda nu subal a dawhang keliden nida ku cueded nu pin-taw , sa nududuc tu amisay a kalikid . u nu-wiy dawhang nu mu-si-ke a dawhang nukasa capa, mukelid tu dihkuay pasayda i amisan , kyu nu-wiy a demiad diheku tu atu suemet . dumasa u nu-wiy nu amisay a dawhang mitesekay isasa a nanum "North Atlantic Deep Water" u tatangahan nu nanum. . nu-wiy a bayu' idaw ku satipyu diheku nika ahecid ku dawhang a micaliway sisa u hekal nida caay kasisulda . ina bayu tuytiniay yadah ku buting , pasu siy a buting, huhuy a buting hipu aa buting,atu ti-abuting, kamu nu sitangahay sa ina dawhang nikasaungay nu demiad ku misumaday sa, kyu u likid nu bayu nu nu-wiy a dawhang tudedemiad kinsaan tu miadih ku wayway anu mahicahica tu . . nu-wiy a bayu' u celaka sananay nu heni u yadahay , namakay 1993 amihcaan malongatu yadah ku nkatahekal nu simal atu nu helakay a simal. Dumasa , idaw ku pasubanaay u nu-wiy a bayu' kapah mala walakli a sasingaan sa , miselep tu diheay sa . wiytiniay a kitidaanťóúśĖľťÄôŚÄčŚúįśĖĻ namahica ťóúśĖľťÄôšļõÁĶźśěú nu-wiy nu tapang , u pulung nu ngangan sa u nu-wiy , tini i se-kan-ti-na-ya pangkiw nu subal nu tipan , walian sa u zuy-tin matatulies , tipan sa u satipyu . . dadan nu bayu ngangingangyu sa , mahida u nu-wiy idaw ku maemicay a bangcalay a kitidaan . duma sa , nu-wiy atu hun-lan atu e-lu-se mat . Hal-se-ta nu nu-wiy te-lu-mu-se-cin a tukay , u kitidaan nu mikuliay mikuwanay a tukay . u pala ninatukay 445.29 cubu akuli , 2023 amihcaan u tademaw nu pulung sa 24,903 atatademawan . na-wiy-ke u nu-wiy- nulan a tademaw nu tademaw sakatuku a tukay, tini i amisan , aw-hu-te a bayu nu tipan . kitidaan nu tukay a na-wiy-ke cen . na-wiy-ke-cen nu kakawsan nu amisan nu-wiy-aw-hu-ten a kitidaan tini i amisan nuy tiniay . . demiadśį£ŚÄô demiad nu na-wiy-ke a demiad u matatudungay nu hu-ci-ti hananay a demiad kanahatu tini i amisan nu amis 220 a ku-li . maalanu amisay a dihekuaya bayu' " u mu-si-ke- nu dihkuay a niladlad macalilaw , na-wiy-ke milihida tu baladtu a kitidaan mangaleb ku diheku. na-wiy-ke tu mihmihcaan nu diheku sa 3.8 ku diheku nu undu, kapal mulangaw ku mucelakay katukuh tu 150 ni demiad , sisa misulul tu binacadan paluma tu cancanan . yu 1154 amihcaan , tini i huwan-ti-kang palutatenga tu ci ni-ta-ke-se a piling nu kiwkay itini , mapatelac ku dateng tina tukayan a ngangan u te-lung-tun "Trundum). nu-wiy a lala' pasu cuedetay a maluyaluyay a subal atu yang-ma-in a subal , pakayni nu timulan nu maw-te-huwang-hu atu pi-te-ise milunguc tu sapikuwan. . u ngangan nu kanatal u aw-se-lu . 2009 amihcaan katukuh 2011 amihcaan , 1013 amihcaan katukuh 2018 a mihcaan u kaydihan nu tademaw sapacakat tu sayaway a tinsu , u nu-wiy u satalakaway tu a kanatal namitadasay , idaw ku talakaway nu lipida nu binacadan atu nikaudip nu binawlan . Á®ĪÁāļÁČĻťöÜśē¶ "Trundum". ina patelac katukuh 12 asiki nu dikudan kya nawci ni-ta-ke-se a situngusay a kiwkay nu tinsukiw patahekal a musumad , i 1192 a mihcaan malingatu , lu-ma a kiwkay malingatu pangangan tina tukayan ni-ta-lu-se . ni-ta-lu-se katukuh 1217 a mihcaan u nu-wiy hank u nanagangan nu kitidaan nu kanatal. u ni-ta-lu-se ina ngangan i nadikudan nu pina a siki u cayay kalecad namahica hakiya malawpes kinapina , u tatelunga a kawaw sa u ni-ta-lu-se a kiwkay nayi 1537 a mihcaan malawpes , nika ina ngangan katukuh i 16 atu 17 nu siki miyung henay . . ni-ta-lu-se tapang a kiwkay ŚįľťĀĒśīõśĖĮšłĽśēôŚļßŚ†ā te-lung-he-mu u tapang a kiwkay , ni-ta-lu-se tapang a kiwkay nu kitakit nu amisan nu teban a siki nu tabakiay a kiwkay , u se-kan-ti-na-wiy-ya satanakiay a kiwkay. . tepal nu kiwkay idaw kya tabakiay a kitidaan nu tapang a luma' u ni-ta-lu-sea kitidaan nu kiwkay 1400 a mihcaan nadikudan mala nu nu-wiy nu tapang a sapapipacuung nu kiwkay , singa han nu heni i nu-wiy-wang-kuwan pasabinawlan a patinankay . .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == nu-wij a baju Ē~ °*** nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° tini i amis a satipju nu ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺu-jun a baju Ē~ °, tini i nu-wij tipan tu amisan masasu panan , u amisaj a baju Ē~ ° at uk…ô-r~…ĺin-r~…ĺan a baju Ē~ ° nu t…ôban . nu-wij a baju Ē~ °nu tipan atu pin-taw a baju Ē~ ° matatur~…ĺin , nuwar~…ĺian nuamisan atu pa-r~…ĺun nu ¶iid a r~…ĺar~…ĺaikidan nu nanum matat…ôpar~…ĺ , i nu tipan atu timur~…ĺan , pi-taw at ur~…ĺu- ¶in a subar~…ĺ kar~…ĺar~…ĺaad nu sasanu baju Ē~ ° matatińß…ôpa u satipju nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° u mar~…ĺar~…ĺijasaj . nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° atu k…ô-r~…ĺin-r~…ĺan a baju Ē~ ° , u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu baju tasasa…ôn *katukuńß* nu sasa nu baju Ē~ ° , u sasaaj nu baju a nanum u ¶u…ôd…ôtaj idaw ku war~…ĺak tar~…ĺakaw. kju nu-wijnu tipan a baju Ē~ ° idaw ku dińßkuaj a r~…ĺikid nu sasaaj a nanum nu baju Ē~ ° . war~…ĺian a sur~…ĺda nu subar~…ĺ a dawńßaŇč k…ôr~…ĺid…ôn nida ku ¶u…ôd…ôd nu pin-taw , sa nududu ¶ tu amisaj a kar~…ĺikid . u nu-wij dawńßaŇč nu mu-si-k…ô a dawńßaŇč nukasa ¶apa, muk…ôr~…ĺid tu dińßkuaj pasajda i amisan , kju nu-wij a d…ômiad dińß…ôku tu atu su…ôm…ôt . dumasa u nu-wij nu amisaj a dawńßaŇč mit…ôs…ôkaj isasa a nanum "nortńß atr~…ĺanti ¶ d…ô…ôp wat…ôr" u tataŇčańßan nu nanum. . nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° idaw ku satipju dińß…ôku nika ańß…ô ¶id ku dawńßaŇč a mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj sisa u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nida ¶aaj kasisur~…ĺda . ina baju tujtiniaj jadańß ku butiŇč , pasu sij a butiŇč, ńßuńßuj a butiŇč ńßipu aa butiŇč,atu ti-abutiŇč, kamu nu sitaŇčańßaj sa ina dawńßaŇč nikasauŇčaj nu d…ômiad ku misumadaj sa, kju u r~…ĺikid nu baju nu nu-wij a dawńßaŇč tud…ôd…ômiad kinsaan tu miadińß ku wajwaj anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a tu . . nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° u ¶…ôr~…ĺaka sananaj nu ńß…ôni u jadańßaj , namakaj **** amińß ¶aan mar~…ĺoŇčatu jadańß ku nkatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu simar~…ĺ atu nu ńß…ôr~…ĺakaj a simar~…ĺ. dumasa , idaw ku pasubanaaj u nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° kapańß mar~…ĺa war~…ĺakr~…ĺi a sasiŇčaan sa , mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu dińß…ôaj sa . wijtiniaj a kitidaan****** namańßi ¶a ****** nu-wij nu tapaŇč , u pur~…ĺuŇč nu ŇčaŇčan sa u nu-wij , tini i s…ô-kan-ti-na-ja paŇčkiw nu subar~…ĺ nu tipan , war~…ĺian sa u zuj-tin matatur~…ĺi…ôs , tipan sa u satipju . . dadan nu baju ŇčaŇčiŇčaŇčju sa , mańßida u nu-wij idaw ku ma…ômi ¶aj a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a kitidaan . duma sa , nu-wij atu ńßun-r~…ĺan atu …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô mat . ńßar~…ĺ-s…ô-ta nu nu-wij t…ô-r~…ĺu-mu-s…ô- ¶in a tukaj , u kitidaan nu mikur~…ĺiaj mikuwanaj a tukaj . u par~…ĺa ninatukaj ***.** ¶ubu akur~…ĺi , **** amińß ¶aan u tad…ômaw nu pur~…ĺuŇč sa **,*** atatad…ômawan . na-wij-k…ô u nu-wij- nur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw nu tad…ômaw sakatuku a tukaj, tini i amisan , aw-ńßu-t…ô a baju nu tipan . kitidaan nu tukaj a na-wij-k…ô ¶…ôn . na-wij-k…ô- ¶…ôn nu kakawsan nu amisan nu-wij-aw-ńßu-t…ôn a kitidaan tini i amisan nuj tiniaj . . d…ômiad** d…ômiad nu na-wij-k…ô a d…ômiad u matatuduŇčaj nu ńßu- ¶i-ti ńßananaj a d…ômiad kanańßatu tini i amisan nu amis *** a ku-r~…ĺi . maar~…ĺanu amisaj a dińß…ôkuaja baju Ē~ ° " u mu-si-k…ô- nu dińßkuaj a nir~…ĺadr~…ĺad ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw , na-wij-k…ô mir~…ĺińßida tu bar~…ĺadtu a kitidaan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku dińß…ôku. na-wij-k…ô tu mińßmińß ¶aan nu dińß…ôku sa *.* ku dińß…ôku nu undu, kapar~…ĺ mur~…ĺaŇčaw ku mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj katukuńß tu *** ni d…ômiad , sisa misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu bina ¶adan par~…ĺuma tu ¶an ¶anan . ju **** amińß ¶aan , tini i ńßuwan-ti-kaŇč par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu ¶i ni-ta-k…ô-s…ô a pir~…ĺiŇč nu kiwkaj itini , mapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku dat…ôŇč tina tukajan a ŇčaŇčan u t…ô-r~…ĺuŇč-tun "trundum). nu-wij a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pasu ¶u…ôd…ôtaj a mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj a subar~…ĺ atu jaŇč-ma-in a subar~…ĺ , pakajni nu timur~…ĺan nu maw-t…ô-ńßuwaŇč-ńßu atu pi-t…ô-is…ô mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu sapikuwan. . u ŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ u aw-s…ô-r~…ĺu . **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan , **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan u kajdińßan nu tad…ômaw sapa ¶akat tu sajawaj a tinsu , u nu-wij u satar~…ĺakawaj tu a kanatar~…ĺ namitadasaj , idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj nu r~…ĺipida nu bina ¶adan atu nikaudip nu binawr~…ĺan . ***** "trundum". ina pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ katukuńß ** asiki nu dikudan kja naw ¶i ni-ta-k…ô-s…ô a situŇčusaj a kiwkaj nu tinsukiw patańß…ôkar~…ĺ a musumad , i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu , r~…ĺu-ma a kiwkaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu paŇčaŇčan tina tukajan ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô . ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan u nu-wij ńßank u nanagaŇčan nu kitidaan nu kanatar~…ĺ. u ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô ina ŇčaŇčan i nadikudan nu pina a siki u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad namańßi ¶a ńßakija mar~…ĺawp…ôs kinapina , u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇča a kawaw sa u ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô a kiwkaj naji **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺawp…ôs , nika ina ŇčaŇčan katukuńß i ** atu ** nu siki mijuŇč ńß…ônaj . . ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô tapaŇč a kiwkaj ******** t…ô-r~…ĺuŇč-ńß…ô-mu u tapaŇč a kiwkaj , ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô tapaŇč a kiwkaj nu kitakit nu amisan nu t…ôban a siki nu tabakiaj a kiwkaj , u s…ô-kan-ti-na-wij-ja satanakiaj a kiwkaj. . t…ôpar~…ĺ nu kiwkaj idaw kja tabakiaj a kitidaan nu tapaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° u ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ôa kitidaan nu kiwkaj **** a mińß ¶aan nadikudan mar~…ĺa nu nu-wij nu tapaŇč a sapapipa ¶uuŇč nu kiwkaj , siŇča ńßan nu ńß…ôni i nu-wij-waŇč-kuwan pasabinawr~…ĺan a patinankaj . .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Nu-wiy a bayu'śĆ™Ś®ĀśĶ∑ nilaculan nu-wiy a bayu' tini i amis a satipyu nu cacayay a lu-yun a bayu', tini i nu-wiy tipan tu amisan masasu panan , u amisay a bayu' at uke-lin-lan a bayu' nu teban . nu-wiy a bayu'nu tipan atu pin-taw a bayu' matatulin , nuwalian nuamisan atu pa-lun nu ciid a lalaikidan nu nanum matatepal , i nu tipan atu timulan , pi-taw at ulu-cin a subal kalalaad nu sasanu bayu' matatihepa u satipyu nu hekal atu nu-wiy a bayu' u malaliyasay . nu-wiy a bayu' atu ke-lin-lan a bayu' , u hekal nu bayu tasasaen 2katukuh3 nu sasa nu bayu' , u sasaay nu bayu a nanum u cuedetay idaw ku walak talakaw. kyu nu-wiynu tipan a bayu' idaw ku dihkuay a likid nu sasaay a nanum nu bayu' . walian a sulda nu subal a dawhang keliden nida ku cueded nu pin-taw , sa nududuc tu amisay a kalikid . u nu-wiy dawhang nu mu-si-ke a dawhang nukasa capa, mukelid tu dihkuay pasayda i amisan , kyu nu-wiy a demiad diheku tu atu suemet . dumasa u nu-wiy nu amisay a dawhang mitesekay isasa a nanum "North Atlantic Deep Water" u tatangahan nu nanum. . nu-wiy a bayu' idaw ku satipyu diheku nika ahecid ku dawhang a micaliway sisa u hekal nida caay kasisulda . ina bayu tuytiniay yadah ku buting , pasu siy a buting, huhuy a buting hipu aa buting,atu ti-abuting, kamu nu sitangahay sa ina dawhang nikasaungay nu demiad ku misumaday sa, kyu u likid nu bayu nu nu-wiy a dawhang tudedemiad kinsaan tu miadih ku wayway anu mahicahica tu . . nu-wiy a bayu' u celaka sananay nu heni u yadahay , namakay 1993 amihcaan malongatu yadah ku nkatahekal nu simal atu nu helakay a simal. Dumasa , idaw ku pasubanaay u nu-wiy a bayu' kapah mala walakli a sasingaan sa , miselep tu diheay sa . wiytiniay a kitidaanťóúśĖľťÄôŚÄčŚúįśĖĻ namahica ťóúśĖľťÄôšļõÁĶźśěú nu-wiy nu tapang , u pulung nu ngangan sa u nu-wiy , tini i se-kan-ti-na-ya pangkiw nu subal nu tipan , walian sa u zuy-tin matatulies , tipan sa u satipyu . . dadan nu bayu ngangingangyu sa , mahida u nu-wiy idaw ku maemicay a bangcalay a kitidaan . duma sa , nu-wiy atu hun-lan atu e-lu-se mat . Hal-se-ta nu nu-wiy te-lu-mu-se-cin a tukay , u kitidaan nu mikuliay mikuwanay a tukay . u pala ninatukay 445.29 cubu akuli , 2023 amihcaan u tademaw nu pulung sa 24,903 atatademawan . na-wiy-ke u nu-wiy- nulan a tademaw nu tademaw sakatuku a tukay, tini i amisan , aw-hu-te a bayu nu tipan . kitidaan nu tukay a na-wiy-ke cen . na-wiy-ke-cen nu kakawsan nu amisan nu-wiy-aw-hu-ten a kitidaan tini i amisan nuy tiniay . . demiadśį£ŚÄô demiad nu na-wiy-ke a demiad u matatudungay nu hu-ci-ti hananay a demiad kanahatu tini i amisan nu amis 220 a ku-li . maalanu amisay a dihekuaya bayu' " u mu-si-ke- nu dihkuay a niladlad macalilaw , na-wiy-ke milihida tu baladtu a kitidaan mangaleb ku diheku. na-wiy-ke tu mihmihcaan nu diheku sa 3.8 ku diheku nu undu, kapal mulangaw ku mucelakay katukuh tu 150 ni demiad , sisa misulul tu binacadan paluma tu cancanan . yu 1154 amihcaan , tini i huwan-ti-kang palutatenga tu ci ni-ta-ke-se a piling nu kiwkay itini , mapatelac ku dateng tina tukayan a ngangan u te-lung-tun "Trundum). nu-wiy a lala' pasu cuedetay a maluyaluyay a subal atu yang-ma-in a subal , pakayni nu timulan nu maw-te-huwang-hu atu pi-te-ise milunguc tu sapikuwan. . u ngangan nu kanatal u aw-se-lu . 2009 amihcaan katukuh 2011 amihcaan , 1013 amihcaan katukuh 2018 a mihcaan u kaydihan nu tademaw sapacakat tu sayaway a tinsu , u nu-wiy u satalakaway tu a kanatal namitadasay , idaw ku talakaway nu lipida nu binacadan atu nikaudip nu binawlan . Á®ĪÁāļÁČĻťöÜśē¶ "Trundum". ina patelac katukuh 12 asiki nu dikudan kya nawci ni-ta-ke-se a situngusay a kiwkay nu tinsukiw patahekal a musumad , i 1192 a mihcaan malingatu , lu-ma a kiwkay malingatu pangangan tina tukayan ni-ta-lu-se . ni-ta-lu-se katukuh 1217 a mihcaan u nu-wiy hank u nanagangan nu kitidaan nu kanatal. u ni-ta-lu-se ina ngangan i nadikudan nu pina a siki u cayay kalecad namahica hakiya malawpes kinapina , u tatelunga a kawaw sa u ni-ta-lu-se a kiwkay nayi 1537 a mihcaan malawpes , nika ina ngangan katukuh i 16 atu 17 nu siki miyung henay . . ni-ta-lu-se tapang a kiwkay ŚįľťĀĒśīõśĖĮšłĽśēôŚļßŚ†ā te-lung-he-mu u tapang a kiwkay , ni-ta-lu-se tapang a kiwkay nu kitakit nu amisan nu teban a siki nu tabakiay a kiwkay , u se-kan-ti-na-wiy-ya satanakiay a kiwkay. . tepal nu kiwkay idaw kya tabakiay a kitidaan nu tapang a luma' u ni-ta-lu-sea kitidaan nu kiwkay 1400 a mihcaan nadikudan mala nu nu-wiy nu tapang a sapapipacuung nu kiwkay , singa han nu heni i nu-wiy-wang-kuwan pasabinawlan a patinankay . .

baju Ē~ ° at uk…ô-r~…ĺin-r~…ĺan a baju Ē~ ° nu t…ôban . nu-wij a baju Ē~ °nu tipan atu pin-taw a baju Ē~ ° matatur~…ĺin , nuwar~…ĺian nuamisan atu pa-r~…ĺun nu ¶iid a r~…ĺar~…ĺaikidan nu nanum matat…ôpar~…ĺ , i nu tipan atu timur~…ĺan , pi-taw at ur~…ĺu- ¶in a subar~…ĺ kar~…ĺar~…ĺaad nu sasanu baju Ē~ ° matatińß…ôpa u satipju nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° u mar~…ĺar~…ĺijasaj . nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° atu k…ô-r~…ĺin-r~…ĺan a baju Ē~ ° , u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu baju tasasa…ôn *katukuńß* nu sasa nu baju Ē~ ° , u sasaaj nu baju a nanum u ¶u…ôd…ôtaj idaw ku war~…ĺak tar~…ĺakaw. kju nu-wijnu tipan a baju Ē~ ° idaw ku dińßkuaj a r~…ĺikid nu sasaaj a nanum nu baju Ē~ ° . war~…ĺian a sur~…ĺda nu subar~…ĺ a dawńßaŇč k…ôr~…ĺid…ôn nida ku ¶u…ôd…ôd nu pin-taw , sa nududu ¶ tu amisaj a kar~…ĺikid . u nu-wij dawńßaŇč nu mu-si-k…ô a dawńßaŇč nukasa ¶apa, muk…ôr~…ĺid tu dińßkuaj pasajda i amisan , kju nu-wij a d…ômiad dińß…ôku tu atu su…ôm…ôt . dumasa u nu-wij nu amisaj a dawńßaŇč mit…ôs…ôkaj isasa a nanum "nortńß atr~…ĺanti ¶ d…ô…ôp wat…ôr" u tataŇčańßan nu nanum. . nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° idaw ku satipju dińß…ôku nika ańß…ô ¶id ku dawńßaŇč a mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj sisa u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nida ¶aaj kasisur~…ĺda . ina baju tujtiniaj jadańß ku butiŇč , pasu sij a butiŇč, ńßuńßuj a butiŇč ńßipu aa butiŇč,atu ti-abutiŇč, kamu nu sitaŇčańßaj sa ina dawńßaŇč nikasauŇčaj nu d…ômiad ku misumadaj sa, kju u r~…ĺikid nu baju nu nu-wij a dawńßaŇč tud…ôd…ômiad kinsaan tu miadińß ku wajwaj anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a tu . . nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° u ¶…ôr~…ĺaka sananaj nu ńß…ôni u jadańßaj , namakaj **** amińß ¶aan mar~…ĺoŇčatu jadańß ku nkatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu simar~…ĺ atu nu ńß…ôr~…ĺakaj a simar~…ĺ. dumasa , idaw ku pasubanaaj u nu-wij a baju Ē~ ° kapańß mar~…ĺa war~…ĺakr~…ĺi a sasiŇčaan sa , mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu dińß…ôaj sa . wijtiniaj a kitidaan****** namańßi ¶a ****** nu-wij nu tapaŇč , u pur~…ĺuŇč nu ŇčaŇčan sa u nu-wij , tini i s…ô-kan-ti-na-ja paŇčkiw nu subar~…ĺ nu tipan , war~…ĺian sa u zuj-tin matatur~…ĺi…ôs , tipan sa u satipju . . dadan nu baju ŇčaŇčiŇčaŇčju sa , mańßida u nu-wij idaw ku ma…ômi ¶aj a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a kitidaan . duma sa , nu-wij atu ńßun-r~…ĺan atu …ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô mat . ńßar~…ĺ-s…ô-ta nu nu-wij t…ô-r~…ĺu-mu-s…ô- ¶in a tukaj , u kitidaan nu mikur~…ĺiaj mikuwanaj a tukaj . u par~…ĺa ninatukaj ***.** ¶ubu akur~…ĺi , **** amińß ¶aan u tad…ômaw nu pur~…ĺuŇč sa **,*** atatad…ômawan . na-wij-k…ô u nu-wij- nur~…ĺan a tad…ômaw nu tad…ômaw sakatuku a tukaj, tini i amisan , aw-ńßu-t…ô a baju nu tipan . kitidaan nu tukaj a na-wij-k…ô ¶…ôn . na-wij-k…ô- ¶…ôn nu kakawsan nu amisan nu-wij-aw-ńßu-t…ôn a kitidaan tini i amisan nuj tiniaj . . d…ômiad** d…ômiad nu na-wij-k…ô a d…ômiad u matatuduŇčaj nu ńßu- ¶i-ti ńßananaj a d…ômiad kanańßatu tini i amisan nu amis *** a ku-r~…ĺi . maar~…ĺanu amisaj a dińß…ôkuaja baju Ē~ ° " u mu-si-k…ô- nu dińßkuaj a nir~…ĺadr~…ĺad ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw , na-wij-k…ô mir~…ĺińßida tu bar~…ĺadtu a kitidaan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku dińß…ôku. na-wij-k…ô tu mińßmińß ¶aan nu dińß…ôku sa *.* ku dińß…ôku nu undu, kapar~…ĺ mur~…ĺaŇčaw ku mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj katukuńß tu *** ni d…ômiad , sisa misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu bina ¶adan par~…ĺuma tu ¶an ¶anan . ju **** amińß ¶aan , tini i ńßuwan-ti-kaŇč par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu ¶i ni-ta-k…ô-s…ô a pir~…ĺiŇč nu kiwkaj itini , mapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku dat…ôŇč tina tukajan a ŇčaŇčan u t…ô-r~…ĺuŇč-tun "trundum). nu-wij a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pasu ¶u…ôd…ôtaj a mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj a subar~…ĺ atu jaŇč-ma-in a subar~…ĺ , pakajni nu timur~…ĺan nu maw-t…ô-ńßuwaŇč-ńßu atu pi-t…ô-is…ô mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu sapikuwan. . u ŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ u aw-s…ô-r~…ĺu . **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan , **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan u kajdińßan nu tad…ômaw sapa ¶akat tu sajawaj a tinsu , u nu-wij u satar~…ĺakawaj tu a kanatar~…ĺ namitadasaj , idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj nu r~…ĺipida nu bina ¶adan atu nikaudip nu binawr~…ĺan . ***** "trundum". ina pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ katukuńß ** asiki nu dikudan kja naw ¶i ni-ta-k…ô-s…ô a situŇčusaj a kiwkaj nu tinsukiw patańß…ôkar~…ĺ a musumad , i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu , r~…ĺu-ma a kiwkaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu paŇčaŇčan tina tukajan ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô . ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan u nu-wij ńßank u nanagaŇčan nu kitidaan nu kanatar~…ĺ. u ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô ina ŇčaŇčan i nadikudan nu pina a siki u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad namańßi ¶a ńßakija mar~…ĺawp…ôs kinapina , u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇča a kawaw sa u ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô a kiwkaj naji **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺawp…ôs , nika ina ŇčaŇčan katukuńß i ** atu ** nu siki mijuŇč ńß…ônaj . . ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô tapaŇč a kiwkaj ******** t…ô-r~…ĺuŇč-ńß…ô-mu u tapaŇč a kiwkaj , ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ô tapaŇč a kiwkaj nu kitakit nu amisan nu t…ôban a siki nu tabakiaj a kiwkaj , u s…ô-kan-ti-na-wij-ja satanakiaj a kiwkaj. . t…ôpar~…ĺ nu kiwkaj idaw kja tabakiaj a kitidaan nu tapaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° u ni-ta-r~…ĺu-s…ôa kitidaan nu kiwkaj **** a mińß ¶aan nadikudan mar~…ĺa nu nu-wij nu tapaŇč a sapapipa ¶uuŇč nu kiwkaj , siŇča ńßan nu ńß…ôni i nu-wij-waŇč-kuwan pasabinawr~…ĺan a patinankaj . .
